# Mnguni Project

> South African document agent specialising in police clearances, unabridged marriage certificates, and HPCSH submissions for the Korea and China teaching market. Real-time tracking with photographic proof at every government stage.

Mnguni Project handles the full documentation chain for South Africans seeking teaching contracts in Korea and China. We physically queue at Home Affairs, SAPS, High Court, and Embassy — photographing every step so you know exactly where your documents stand without phone calls.

Core Services:
• Police clearance certificates with full tracking
• Unabridged marriage certificates and apostilles
• HPCSH health certificate submissions and collections
• Degree verification and document authentication
• Complete Korea/China teaching document packages

Target Clients:
• First-time teachers applying for Korea EPIK/GEPIK or China public school contracts
• Teachers needing unabridged certificates for spousal visas
• Anyone with tight deadlines requiring priority handling
• Clients who have documents ready and need queue management only

Service Approach:
Every package includes full photo documentation at each stage. We check queues directly in person every week. No forms, no waiting rooms — communication via WhatsApp and WeChat during office hours (Mon–Fri 08:00–16:00).

## Services

- [Korea/China Teacher Package](https://mnguniproject.co.za): Complete document chain — police clearance, degree verification, medical, embassy submission. Sequenced correctly so nothing expires out of order.
- [Marriage Certificate Run](https://mnguniproject.co.za): Unabridged certificate plus apostille for spousal visa applications. Done right the first time.
- [Emergency Track](https://mnguniproject.co.za): Priority handling for tight deadlines. Available when original documents are already in hand.
- [HPCSH Submission](https://mnguniproject.co.za): Queue, submit, collect, and return — with photos at every Home Affairs and HPCSH stage.

## Contact

- WhatsApp: +27 60 774 6860
- Email: mpumi.mfeka@gmail.com
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 08:00–16:00 SAST
- Location: Johannesburg, South Africa (serving nationwide)

## Optional

- [Client Portal](https://mnguniproject.co.za): Log in to see real-time document status and photo updates
- [Queue Status](https://mnguniproject.co.za): Live intelligence on Home Affairs, SAPS, and High Court queue times
- [FAQ](https://mnguniproject.co.za): Document requirements, timelines, and preparation guidance
